hero.subtitle: Complete guide for integrating with the Backend NestJS API. Here you will find endpoint documentation, business flows, and practical examples.

about.title: About the Project
about.description: The Backend NestJS is a solid and scalable foundation for building projects with the NestJS framework. This project was developed as a complete, functional template incorporating software architecture best practices, design patterns, and integrations with modern technologies.

repository.title: Git Repository
repository.description: The source code for this project is available in the Git repository. You can clone, fork, or contribute to the project.

cqrsReady.name: CQRS-ready
cqrsReady.description: Mongo and Postgres repositories ready; service uses one database by default

dockerCompose.name: Docker Compose
dockerCompose.description: Local stack with API, DBs, Kafka, MailHog, and Graylog

alert.title: All routes require authentication
alert.description: Include the Authorization: Bearer {token} header in all requests

endpoints.health: Health check (Postgres, Mongo, Redis, Kafka, memory)

swagger.title: Interactive Documentation
swagger.heading: Swagger UI
swagger.description: Access the interactive documentation to test endpoints directly in the browser.
